specSection:
seedExamples :: () → ()
seedExamples() =
  | ¬empty(backlog/docs/) ∨ ¬empty(backlog/decisions/) → skip
  | otherwise → {
      backlog document create <onboardingDocTitle> --type guide,
      backlog decision create  <templateDecisionTitle> --status "Accepted"
    }
ground_truth_rationale: Both backlog/docs/ and backlog/decisions/ are empty. The condition ¬empty(backlog/docs/) ∨ ¬empty(backlog/decisions/) is false, so the 'otherwise' branch fires: seed the example document and decision.
